status: targeted deterministic validation; not TESS flight-data evidence

model.geometry: exact circle overlap with quadratic limb darkening under a small-planet local-intensity approximation

equivalent_width_check.interpretation: Finite-exposure integration smooths contact morphology without materially creating or removing integrated transit signal.

interpretation: For two-minute cadence the intrinsic midpoint depth is almost unchanged, but ingress and egress can differ by a non-negligible fraction of a 100-200 ppm signal.
The correction becomes essential for longer cadences and is retained in every physical trial through exposure_days and supersample provenance fields.
The benchmark validates model behavior only; scientific completeness still requires the queued six-target TESS campaign.
